title: Crispy Creamy Argentinian Butter Croquettes
description: These buttery and crispy croquettes are a hangover-cure inspired dish featuring single cream and are diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Mix the flour and kosher salt in a bowl. Add two eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Gradually add single cream until you reach a smooth batter consistency.
Place a large skillet on medium-high heat with enough oil for frying. Heat up the oil to 350°F (175°C).
Using your hands or a spoon, form the mixture into small croquette shapes and gently drop them into the hot oil, ensuring they are not touching.
Fry until golden brown on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side. Keep an eye on them as you don't want to burn them.
Once done, transfer onto a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
Broil for an additional 10 seconds per side to get the crispy exterior. Remove from oven and serve hot.
